ordering_note: Valuation runs AFTER the two-sided thesis so the recommended range is reconciled to the argument, not used to anchor it.

method_1_comps.approach: ARR multiple vs mid-market SaaS comps, adjusted for growth + Rule of 40
method_1_comps.rationale: Decelerating 38% growth + Rule-of-40 of 31 + 88% GRR -> below-median multiple; AI feature earns a small premium

method_2_dcf.approach: 5-year standalone FCF + terminal value, WACC via CAPM
method_2_dcf.sanity_check: implied exit multiple within the comps band -> passes cross-check (financial-analyst: cross-check DCF vs comparables)

method_3_npv_irr_on_synergies.approach: NPV/IRR on acquisition cash flows INCLUDING synergy model, net of re-baselined $7M integration

at_273m_6_5x.verdict: borderline — just under hurdle in base case

at_252m_6_0x.verdict: PASSES 20% hurdle in base case, positive NPV

bear_case_at_252m.verdict: downside still loses — size the deal for it

reconciliation.gap_to_ask: ask $336M is $63-93M above fair value; the deal only works on a negotiated entry

the_number: Offer $252M (6.0x ARR); structure cash-and-stock with an earn-out bridging to the seller's $336M ask on realized cross-sell + AI milestones; hard walk above $285M.
source: financial-analyst (DCF + WACC + terminal value + comps cross-check) + business-investment-advisor (NPV/IRR vs 20% hurdle, downside case, walk-away discipline, earn-out to bridge price gap) + saas-metrics-coach (Rule-of-40-adjusted ARR multiple)
